headline: Jim Cramer on Cardinal Health: “I Want You to Buy It and Buy It, Get This, Aggressively”
summary: Jim Cramer reviewed Cardinal Health, Inc. (NYSE:CAH) while breaking down 16 stocks for a market facing higher energy costs and economic uncertainty. During the episode, a caller sought Cramer’s opinion on the stock, and he said: Alright, Jason Hollar is doing a great job. I got too enthusiastic about it. I’ll remonstrate on Friday. I […]
